programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: April struggles. Paddy reels.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sarah goes rummaging for evidence to aid Todd's case against Theo, Ben and Eva cancel Maggie's plans, and another row with Carl triggers Debbie's health.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the victorious kingdom head out for their safari and bush banquet, a big decision needs to made as the first campmate prepares to leave the South African Savannah.

programme.title: DMV: Department of Motor Vehicles
programme.desc: Sitcom following staff at the East Hollywood Department of Motor Vehicles. Colette pines for her coworker Noa while enduring teasing from her colleagues.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: The Late Debate
programme.desc: Regional political review and discussion programme for the London area, in which different local MPs and politicians discuss current affairs and political issues in the area.

programme.title: The Real Unforgotten
programme.desc: The concluding part of the two-part series. The detectives unravel long-forgotten secrets and have a potential circumstantial case, but they need more to prove their case in court.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the victorious kingdom head out for their safari and bush banquet, a big decision needs to made as the first campmate prepares to leave the South African Savannah.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a nail-biting semi-final of the game show as the last 17 players fight for a place in the grand finale and a shot at 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: News, current affairs and lively debate.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.

programme.title: ITV Lunchtime News
programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Antony Cotton, Matt Dawson, and Stacey Dooley all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David and his Dealers' Den visit Blackpool, where Tracy Thackray-Howitt gets a very cheeky chappy and Jo Brayshaw gets flattered into parting with her cash.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as yet another of his daring contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a chance to win a life-changing cash prize.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: All that stands between Jamie from Bognor Regis, Maria from Stevenage, Michael from Surbiton, Susan from County Durham and thousands of pounds is one of the Chasers.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: It'll Be Alright on the Night
programme.desc: Tom Allen unveils cock-ups featuring our favourite TV stars and programmes with Fiona Bruce, Dermot O'Leary, Alex Jones, Richard Osman, Bradley Walsh and many more.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon supports April. Lewis has a plan.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Todd struggles to get back to normality, Carl makes a decision on Ronnie's offer, Jodie creates a rift in the Platt family, and Ben bulldozes Maggie's efforts to downplay her past.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As banter turns sour, two campmates end up going head-to-head. With friction forming, it could damage the already fragile camp.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: Lenny Henry faces the grilling of a lifetime from neurodivergent interviewers. Who does he regret idolising? In what order does he wash his body parts? No question is off limits.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Romesh Ranganathan's Parents' Evening
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan hosts the celebrity game show as Gabby Logan, Pete Wicks, Krishnan Guru-Murthy and their families compete for charity.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As banter turns sour, two campmates end up going head-to-head. With friction forming, it could damage the already fragile camp.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Jimmy and Shivi's Farmhouse Breakfast
programme.desc: Jimmy and Shivi are joined by chef Paul Ainsworth, plus there's flower arranging, and close encounters with raccoons.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: James Martin's travels around France continue on the Canal Du Midi - starting in historic Carcassonne, he cooks a delicious fish stew on the banks of the canal.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Classic action-adventure film starring Sam Neill and Laura Dern, 1993. A band of humans fight for survival when cloned dinosaurs break loose during a tour of a new theme park.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James welcomes actor Nigel Havers to his home in the Hampshire countryside and tastes delicious recipes from chefs Tom Aikens, Sabrina Gidda and Atul Kochhar.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Royal Kitchen Gardens
programme.desc: Raymond is back at Hampton Court Palace to meet one of its oldest residents and learn how Georgian hot chocolate would have been made.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

programme.title: ITV Racing Live: Scottish Grand National
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents live coverage from Ayr and Newbury. The Scottish Grand National is the feature race of the afternoon.

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: Looking back at Tipping Point's most thrilling end games as plucky players and famous faces alike take on the machine for its jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as all that stands between Conor from London, Ian from Welwyn Garden City, Sadie from Lancaster, Linda from Wigan and thousands of pounds is a Chaser.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Guz Khan, Angela Scanlon, and Joel Corry join Stephen Mulhern as they try to 'say what they see' and guess well-known phrases for their chance to win 50,000 pounds for charity.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: The auditions reach their conclusion as the last assortment of acts take to the stage in Blackpool, and the performers hope to get one step closer to the prize of 250,000 pounds.
